title: Care for health and welfare of livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Care for health and welfare of livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary.

pcs.text: Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task.

pcs.text: Check and report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Monitor and assess livestock health and welfare

pcs.text: Check livestock regularly to assess health and welfare
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check livestock regularly to assess health and welfare?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check livestock regularly to assess health and welfare.

pcs.text: Recognise signs of poor health, injury or abnormal behaviour and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise signs of poor health, injury or abnormal behaviour and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise signs of poor health, injury or abnormal behaviour and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Monitor and assess livestock health and welfare

elements.title: Implement livestock health and welfare procedures

pcs.text: Follow biosecurity procedures as instructed to minimise the risk of disease
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow biosecurity procedures as instructed to minimise the risk of disease?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow biosecurity procedures as instructed to minimise the risk of disease.

pcs.text: Handle livestock using workplace hygiene practices to reduce risks from transmissible diseases and general infection control
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle livestock using workplace hygiene practices to reduce risks from transmissible diseases and general infection control?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle livestock using workplace hygiene practices to reduce risks from transmissible diseases and general infection control.

pcs.text: Treat sick and injured livestock or make arrangements to humanely destroy livestock as instructed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Treat sick and injured livestock or make arrangements to humanely destroy livestock as instructed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Treat sick and injured livestock or make arrangements to humanely destroy livestock as instructed.

pcs.text: Identify environmental implications associated with livestock husbandry practices, and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental implications associated with livestock husbandry practices, and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental implications associated with livestock husbandry practices, and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Follow workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Follow workplace animal welfare emergency procedures where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace animal welfare emergency procedures where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace animal welfare emergency procedures where required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Implement livestock health and welfare procedures

elements.title: Administer drenches, vaccines and prescribed treatments to livestock

pcs.text: Prepare livestock treatment site and facilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare livestock treatment site and facilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare livestock treatment site and facilities.

pcs.text: Prepare livestock treatments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare livestock treatments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare livestock treatments.

pcs.text: Move, yard and control livestock and inspect for treatment requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move, yard and control livestock and inspect for treatment requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move, yard and control livestock and inspect for treatment requirements.

pcs.text: Handle livestock using good livestock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle livestock using good livestock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle livestock using good livestock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Administer animal health treatments as instructed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Administer animal health treatments as instructed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Administer animal health treatments as instructed.

pcs.text: Record health treatment batch numbers and date of expiry according to regulations and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record health treatment batch numbers and date of expiry according to regulations and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record health treatment batch numbers and date of expiry according to regulations and workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Administer drenches, vaccines and prescribed treatments to livestock

elements.title: Monitor treated livestock and maintain records

pcs.text: Monitor livestock post-treatment for signs of treatment effectiveness
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor livestock post-treatment for signs of treatment effectiveness?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor livestock post-treatment for signs of treatment effectiveness.

pcs.text: Recognise and report livestock health and condition abnormalities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and report livestock health and condition abnormalities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and report livestock health and condition abnormalities.

pcs.text: Record disease incidence, livestock losses, and treatments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record disease incidence, livestock losses, and treatments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record disease incidence, livestock losses, and treatments.

pcs.text: Report post-treatment information to the supervisor so that prevention strategies can be planned and implemented
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report post-treatment information to the supervisor so that prevention strategies can be planned and implemented?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report post-treatment information to the supervisor so that prevention strategies can be planned and implemented.

pcs.text: Dispose of livestock residues and waste according to environmental practices and supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of livestock residues and waste according to environmental practices and supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of livestock residues and waste according to environmental practices and supervisor instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Monitor treated livestock and maintain records

elements.title: Complete work

pcs.text: Clean and maintain facilities using appropriate hygiene procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain facilities using appropriate hygiene procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain facilities using appropriate hygiene procedures.

pcs.text: Return materials and unused treatments to store or dispose of according to workplace environment and biosecurity policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Return materials and unused treatments to store or dispose of according to workplace environment and biosecurity policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return materials and unused treatments to store or dispose of according to workplace environment and biosecurity policies and procedures.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store equipment and materials according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store equipment and materials according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store equipment and materials according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Report work outcomes and faults, wear or damage of equipment to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report work outcomes and faults, wear or damage of equipment to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report work outcomes and faults, wear or damage of equipment to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Complete work

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
